About the College

Building Futures Through Applied Knowledge

College of Applied Science, Kozhikode, is affiliated to the University of Calicut and was established in 1993 under the Institute of Human Resources Development (IHRD), Government of Kerala.

The college offers a comprehensive range of undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in Computer Science, Electronics, Commerce, Business Administration, Mathematics, English, and more — equipping students with both academic rigour and practical skill.

The college also offers the Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Application (PGDCA) and Diploma in Computer Application (DCA) from IHRD.

🎓 Calicut University Affiliated
🏛 IHRD, Govt. of Kerala
💻 Applied Technology Focus
🔬 Science & Commerce Streams
